failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch was called without the required string field product_type, even though the correct value, "Electric Kettle", was available.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was clear: search available Electric Kettles with capacity 1.5L and price greater than 147.46. The required product_type value was already available from the user request and the coordinator plan. The Researcher omitted the required product_type argument, and the tool later returned a SchemaError confirming the invocation was malformed.
